# Chapter 1: Forces and free-body diagrams  (~90 pp)
- 1.1 Force as a vector (10) · 1.2 Newton's laws as observations (12) · 1.3 Free-body diagrams: the discipline (15) · 1.4 Constraints: rolling, pinning, fixing (12) · 1.5 Friction (12) · 1.6 Worked examples: a ladder, a truss joint, a hanging mass (15) · 1.7 Failure section: free-body diagrams that hid the real load path (14)

**Archetype**: balance. **Project**: draw FBDs for ten mechanical scenes the reader photographs. **Exercises**: 35.
